mapper.select: SELECT scope, idempotency_key_hash, run_id, CAST(result_jsonb AS TEXT) AS result_jsonb, completed_at FROM runner_message_idempotency_record WHERE scope = #{scope} AND idempotency_key_hash = #{idempotencyKeyHash}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runner_message_idempotency_record ( scope, idempotency_key_hash, run_id, result_jsonb, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{scope}, #{idempotencyKeyHash}, #{runId}, CAST(#{resultJson} AS jsonb), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (scope, idempotency_key_hash) DO NOTHING
